title: agrimonia pilosa var. glabrata
intro: Agrimonia pilosa var. glabrata is a variety of the agrimony plant, a flowering plant native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for wound healing and soothing digestive issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Agrimonia pilosa var. glabrata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
